turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. I have an Arogya Sanjeevani policy. Is that covered at your clinic?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Arogya Sanjeevani is a standard health plan offered by multiple insurers. Could you tell me which company issued yours?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we are empanelled with Oriental Insurance. Your Arogya Sanjeevani policy should be usable here for cashless claims within the coverage limits.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: My coverage is 5 lakhs. I need a knee replacement. Should be within limit.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Knee replacement costs vary but are often within 5 lakhs range. Please confirm with Oriental Insurance and get a pre-auth before the procedure. Our insurance desk will assist you from our end.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Will do. Thanks for the guidance.
